title: Maximum Score From Removing Substrings
titleCn: 删除子字符串的最大得分

testcases.input: s = "cdbcbbaaabab", x = 4, y = 5 Output: 19 Explanation: - Remove the "ba" underlined in "cdbcbbaaabab". Now, s = "cdbcbbaaab" and 5 points are added to the score. - Remove the "ab" underlined in "cdbcbbaaab". Now, s = "cdbcbbaa" and 4 points are added to the score. - Remove the "ba" underlined in "cdbcbbaa". Now, s = "cdbcba" and 5 points are added to the score. - Remove the "ba" underlined in "cdbcba". Now, s = "cdbc" and 5 points are added to the score. Total score = 5 + 4 + 5 + 5 = 19.
testcases.expectedOutput: 19 Explanation: - Remove the "ba" underlined in "cdbcbbaaabab". Now, s = "cdbcbbaaab" and 5 points are added to the score. - Remove the "ab" underlined in "cdbcbbaaab". Now, s = "cdbcbbaa" and 4 points are added to the score. - Remove the "ba" underlined in "cdbcbbaa". Now, s = "cdbcba" and 5 points are added to the score. - Remove the "ba" underlined in "cdbcba". Now, s = "cdbc" and 5 points are added to the score. Total score = 5 + 4 + 5 + 5 = 19.
